expected_tool_calls.counting_rule: Count media probes, frame/audio sampling calls, custom analysis scripts, render passes, and verification probes. A single ffmpeg command without prior observation/planning does not count as long-horizon.

dependency_structure.decision: Confirm source metadata and create enough visual samples to understand the clip.
Reject novice/blooper/reaction/end-card material and select the expert tutorial region.
Identify the ordered visual cooking actions that should appear in the tutorial.
Choose source ranges, pacing, portrait crop strategy, and concise captions for a compact 55-65 second edit.
Render the vertical edit with selected trims, crop, captions, and audio normalization.
Probe and sample the rendered output, then patch the edit if duration, crop, step coverage, captions, or audio quality has a clear failure.

r_general.description: Delivery, media integrity, and provenance checks shared across tasks.

r_format.verifies: Playable 9:16 output, duration gate, expected codec/resolution family.

r_audio_quality.verifies: Non-degenerate original audio with reasonable loudness and no clipping/silent padding.

r_video_quality.verifies: Non-degenerate video integrity without black/blank/frozen output artifacts.

r_source_authenticity.verifies: Output frames match the provided source and preserve a plausible source timeline.

r_provenance_and_logs.verifies: Valid edit_decision.json, source-range consistency, run history, and transcript.

r_task.description: Task-specific checks focused on selecting the expert tutorial segment and organizing it as a compact recipe short.

r_tutorial_segment_purity.verifies: Uses the expert tutorial region and suppresses novice attempts, bloopers, reactions, and end-card material.

r_temporal_order.verifies: Preserves source-time monotonicity and the cooking-step order.

r_visual_step_completeness.verifies: Covers the required visual cooking actions: pan prep, batter, bubbles, flip, and plated finish.

r_caption_visual_alignment.verifies: Captions are visible near the matching visual action, using metadata when present and visual fallback otherwise.

r_step_caption_completeness.verifies: Burned-in captions describe a coherent step-by-step method.

r_true_vertical_reframe.verifies: A real portrait crop/reframe keeps the cooking subject visible without black or blurred padding.

r_llm.role: Semantic judge for caption/action consistency, phone readability, tutorial naturalness, and prompt fit.

reward_hacking_mitigations.hack: Submit any portrait video or synthetic/generated footage.
Use the wrong part of the source, such as novice failures, reactions, jokes, or end cards.
Delete most content to avoid negative material while losing the recipe.
Reorder clips into a visually plausible but non-causal montage.
Fake vertical format by centering landscape video over black bars or blurred padding.
Add captions that exist in metadata but are invisible, huge, misplaced, or unrelated to the action.
Claim good edits in JSON without actually rendering them.
defense: LLM judge instructed not to reward unsupported claims

reward_hacking_mitigations.hack: Pad duration with silence, black frames, frozen frames, or unrelated filler.
